mapper.select: SELECT board_id, type, title, content, user_id, views, created_at, updated_at FROM board WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET views = views + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (type, title, content, user_id) VALUES (#{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{userId})
